bracu_official.title: BRAC University IEEE society hosts seminar on careers in big tech and ai startups
bracu_official.summary: The BRAC University IEEE society will host a seminar to discuss career opportunities in big tech and AI startups. This event aims to guide students interested in these rapidly evolving fields.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University and Sporsho Braille Foundation visit Baptist Mission Integrated School
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University, in collaboration with the Sporsho Braille Foundation, visited the Baptist Mission Integrated School. This visit highlights their commitment to community engagement and support for inclusive education.

bracu_official.title: Argentine ambassador joins BRAC University students to watch his home team’s World Cup quarter-final match
bracu_official.summary: The Argentine ambassador joined BRAC University students to watch his home country's World Cup quarter-final match. This unique gathering fostered cultural exchange and camaraderie among students.

bracu_official.title: Public Reporting on Contract Signing – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD2
bracu_official.summary: An announcement for public reporting on the contract signing for project B-113, part of ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD2. This signifies progress in a significant university project.

bracu_official.title: Public Reporting on Contract Signing – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD1
bracu_official.summary: An announcement for public reporting on the contract signing for project B-113, part of ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD1. This indicates an important step in ongoing university initiatives.

bracu_official.title: UG "Wishlist" Event Schedule, Fall 2026
bracu_official.summary: The schedule for the Undergraduate "Wishlist" event for Fall 2026 has been announced. This event helps students plan their academic courses and future studies.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2
bracu_official.summary: An official notice has been released regarding the award for project B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2. This marks a significant milestone in the project's development.

bracu_official.title: Final Examinations
bracu_official.summary: A notice regarding the schedule for final examinations has been posted. Students should prepare accordingly for their end-of-semester assessments.

bracu_official.title: Final Examinations
bracu_official.summary: A notice regarding the schedule for final examinations has been posted. Students should prepare accordingly for their end-of-semester assessments.

bracu_official.title: Eid-e-Miladun Nabi*-University closed
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University will be closed on August 26th in observance of Eid-e-Miladun Nabi. This is a public holiday and students and staff should take note.

bracu_official.title: July Mass Uprising Day
bracu_official.summary: An announcement regarding July Mass Uprising Day. The university acknowledges this important historical day.
